case_title: MARYLIN INC., DBA MID CITY MKT & DELI VS. HANAN BUKHARI et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARYLIN INC., DBA MID CITY MKT & DELI AS TO DEFENDANT BUKHARI, MAHMOUD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARYLIN INC., DBA MID CITY MKT & DELI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUKHARI, HANAN BUKHARI, MAHMOUD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO MAHMOUD BUKHARI.
